# Neural Network

**Summary**: A machine learning approach to model complex non-linear relationships between variables.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2002-ibrahim|Ibrahim, 2002]] utilized probabilistic neural networks (PNN) to predict porosity and permeability from multi-attribute transforms.
